name: Bank Statement
description: Bank or credit card statement. Detects IBAN, BIC/SWIFT, masked card numbers (****1234), transaction references, dates, plus names, addresses, account numbers and amounts (balances and transactions are sensitive).

patterns.name: BIC / SWIFT
patterns.description: BIC/SWIFT code — 8 or 11 character bank identifier

patterns.name: Masked card (****1234)
patterns.description: Card number with masked digits + last 4 visible

patterns.name: Full card number
patterns.description: 16-digit card number with optional spaces or dashes

patterns.name: Transaction reference
patterns.description: Transaction or reference ID with common prefixes

patterns.name: Date (any common format)
patterns.description: Dates in DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, DD.MM.YYYY etc.
